name: Bodega Binitord
description: A family winery built over a former quarry south of Ciutadella, with 7 ha of vines and around 30,000 bottles a year of Vi de la Terra Illa de Menorca (the island's regional wine appellation). An intimate, unhurried visit among vines that stand up to the tramontana.

highlights: walk the vineyard and learn how the wine is made with the team themselves
taste their wines (white, rosé, red) and the first vermouth made in Menorca
book the guided visit online (ES/EN/FR), around 1 hr
